mass_delta_lock.trigger: Any [Entity A] attempts to consume [Entity B].
mass_delta_lock.execution: Query [Somatic_Mass_Matrix]. Require: Mass(A) > (Mass(B) * 1.618). If TRUE: Authorize Strike. If FALSE: Abort (Risk of indigestion/membrane rupture).
mass_delta_lock.result: Establishes a universal food-chain based strictly on thermodynamic geometry, agnostic of the element's actual software purpose.

agnostic_engulfment.trigger: Predator boundary intersects Prey boundary contextually.
agnostic_engulfment.execution: Invoke [Membrane_Override]. Form a closed-loop topology around Prey. Cut all I/O signal to Prey.
agnostic_engulfment.result: The target is eaten. It can no longer interact with the universe, nor can it be saved.

universal_mastication.execution: Execute blind recursion through Prey's .json objects. Target specifically: ['bpms_structure_identity'], ['specific_mechanics'], ['presettings']. Apply VALUE: NULL. Retain byte payload weight only.
universal_mastication.result: The target is completely stripped of what made it special. It is now pure calories.

proportional_function_scaling.execution: Convert retained bytes to Escrow Joules. Pass Escrow to Predator. Increase Predator's 3D topological radius. Iterate through Predator's 'primary_function_variables' and apply a scaling multiplier == (Harvested_Joules / Predator_Base_Joules).
proportional_function_scaling.result: The Predator universally gets 'better' at whatever it natively does, utilizing the stolen mass.

assimilation_execution_loop.str_phase_5: FUNCTIONAL_SWELL (Predator native logic up-scales proportional to meal size)

fields.metabolic_growth: The agnostic percentage increase applied to the Predator's physical dimensions and primary operational output.
